postReview.title: Belgium 2-0 Romania: Tielemans and De Bruyne hand Red Devils much-needed win
postReview.description: Belgium, Romania, Ukraine and Slovakia are all level in Group E at Euro 2024 after the Red Devils got off the mark with Saturday's 2-0 win.
